headline: Coors brings back cult-favorite beer after 5-year hiatus
summary: For decades, one budget beer built a cult following as one of America's most recognizable "college beers," earning popularity for its cheap price, high alcohol content, and straightforward appeal. The budget-friendly lager became a staple at college parties, tailgates, and late-night gatherings ...
